claim: Google's Agent Developer Kit (ADK) builds agent SDKs with deployment-ready architecture, evaluations, and multi-agent patterns from day one
actionable: Use ADK for production agent deployment; it prioritizes operational readiness over exploratory features
source_title: Google Launches an Agent SDK - Agent Development Kit

claim: ADK supports multiple model providers (Gemini, OpenAI, Claude) via LiteLLM integration, not just Google's proprietary models
actionable: Use ADK with your preferred model provider; it abstracts vendor lock-in by supporting LiteLLM
source_title: Google Launches an Agent SDK - Agent Development Kit

claim: ADK integrates tools from LangChain, OpenAPI, and MCP servers from the start, enabling rapid tool composition
actionable: Leverage ADK's tool marketplace to quickly compose agents from pre-built integrations
source_title: Google Launches an Agent SDK - Agent Development Kit

claim: ADK prioritizes multi-agent architecture from the start, reflecting the trend toward orchestrated agent systems over single agents
actionable: Design agents with multi-agent composition in mind; use ADK patterns for agent delegation and orchestration
source_title: Google Launches an Agent SDK - Agent Development Kit
